title: Smoke-Hot Ethiopian Lamb Wot
description: A keto-friendly Ethiopian lamb stew featuring tender lamb and a jammy, crumbly crust, served with toasted injera bread.
instructions: Heat oil in a large cazuela over medium-high heat. Add the lamb and cook until browned, about 5 minutes, then remove from the cazuela. Add the onion to the cazuela and cook until caramelized, about 8 minutes. Add the ginger and garlic to the cazuela and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant. Add the berbere spice mix, tumeric, cumin, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper to the cazuela and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant. Add the lamb back to the cazuela and cook for 5 minutes, until well coated with the spice mixture. Add 1 cup of water to the cazuela and bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes, or until the lamb is tender. Stir in 2 tablespoons of butter to enrich the sauce. Serve the lamb mixture over toasted injera bread, garnished with chopped parsley if desired.
